headline: Test harness methodology and the geopolitics of AI chips dominated the week as research breakouts clustered around generative and operator techniques.
body: A wave of technique breakouts led the rotation, with multilingual speech, image inpainting, optimal transport, streaming algorithms, and neural operators all surfacing as new entrants alongside generative AI and noise prediction. On the methodology front, Meta-style evaluation harnesses are being framed as the emerging industry standard, and the open-source Omnigent meta harness for agents arrived in parallel [2][10]. Geopolitics ran underneath the week: Anthropic accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities, Europe pushed back on U.S. semiconductor export controls, and Cerebras stock fell after a margin miss in its first public earnings [0][5][11]. Practitioner threads also tracked the shift toward LLM-driven code generation and its token cost implications [1][4].
